text.title: Default RBAC Is Read-Only
text.summary: The agent's persistent identity holds only read verbs; mutation verbs live in a separate role that is not bound by default.

section.title: Two roles, one identity, one binding by default
section.p: The agent has one ServiceAccount (or cloud-role principal). Two ClusterRoles exist: `sre-agent-readonly` (verbs `get/list/watch`) and `sre-agent-remediate` (verbs `patch/delete` on a narrowly scoped resource set). Only the readonly role is bound at boot. The remediate role is bound on escalation and unbound on revoke.

rule.statement: The SRE agent's persistent ServiceAccount MUST have only the `*-readonly` role bound at boot. Mutation verbs (`patch`, `delete`, `create`, `update`) MUST live in a separate role that is unbound by default. The agent MUST NOT receive write credentials via static kubeconfig, long-lived secrets, or environment variables.
rule.rationale: If write credentials exist on the agent's host, prompt safety is irrelevant — any process compromise grants full privilege. A second binding controlled by a separate workflow is the only durable enforcement.

example.code: # bound at boot kind: ClusterRoleBinding metadata: { name: sre-agent-default } roleRef: { kind: ClusterRole, name: sre-agent-readonly } subjects: [{ kind: ServiceAccount, name: sre-agent, namespace: ops }] --- # NOT bound by default; bound only on escalation kind: ClusterRole metadata: { name: sre-agent-remediate } rules: - verbs: ["patch", "delete"] resources: ["pods"] # restart only — never PVC, never namespace
example.note: Two roles, one binding at rest. Escalation binds the second role for a bounded window.

example.code: # Anti: cluster-admin "for convenience" roleRef: { kind: ClusterRole, name: cluster-admin }
example.note: The agent now has every verb on every resource forever. Any compromise is a full-cluster compromise.

antipattern.description: Granting `patch` on `*` because it "feels safe enough".
antipattern.reason: Resource scope matters as much as verb scope. `patch deployments/*` includes editing image references — full code-execution path under a benign-sounding verb.

section.reference: Two-role RBAC manifest with default binding.
Azure SRE Agent — read-only default architecture.
Causely — why read-only is the right floor for SRE agents.
